name: Healthcare AI Platform
description: Build an AI-powered patient management system with predictive analytics for early disease detection and resource scheduling.

name: Banking Portal Modernization
description: Modernize legacy core banking portal to cloud-native microservices architecture on AWS, with a new React frontend.

name: E-Commerce Recommendation Engine
description: Build a personalized product recommendation engine using deep learning and integrate it into the existing React storefront.

name: DevSecOps Platform Implementation
description: Implement a DevSecOps platform with automated security scanning, compliance checks, and Kubernetes-based deployments on Azure.

name: Insurance Claims GenAI Automation
description: Automate insurance claims processing using generative AI for document extraction, classification, and approval recommendation.

name: Logistics Real-Time Tracking System
description: Build a real-time shipment tracking system using event-driven architecture with Kafka, FastAPI, and MongoDB for 1M+ daily events.

name: Data Analytics Platform
description: Build a centralized data analytics platform with real-time and batch data processing using PySpark, AWS Glue, and Snowflake.

name: Mobile Banking App
description: Develop a cross-platform mobile banking app with Flutter, real-time notifications via Firebase, and a secure Python backend on AWS.

name: CRM Salesforce Implementation
description: Full Salesforce CRM implementation including custom Apex development, Lightning Web Components, and ERP system integration.

name: Media Streaming Infrastructure
description: Design and implement multi-cloud streaming infrastructure on AWS and GCP to handle 10M+ concurrent users with 99.99% uptime SLA.
